description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages, test and deploy. Add a UnitTest job in the test stage that uses the python:3.6 Docker image, runs before_script commands `pip install -r requirements.txt`, `python manage.py makemigrations`, `python manage.py migrate`, and `python manage.py collectstatic --no-input`, then executes `coverage run --include='fitur_*/*' manage.py test` followed by `coverage report -m`. Add a Deployment job in the deploy stage that uses the ruby:2.4 Docker image, runs before_script commands `gem install dpl` and `wget -qO- https://cli-assets.heroku.com/install-ubuntu.sh | sh`, then runs `dpl --provider=heroku --app=$HEROKU_APPNAME --api-key=$HEROKU_APIKEY`, `export HEROKU_API_KEY=$HEROKU_APIKEY`, and `heroku run --app $HEROKU_APPNAME migrate`. Configure the Deployment job with a production environment named production and URL $HEROKU_APP_HOST, and let both jobs use the default on_success trigger with no caches or artifacts.
